feed.title: Lucas Bucht
feed.subtitle: Portfolio and blog for Lucas Bucht. Projects, writing, and a bit of whatever I'm currently breaking.

entry.title: Hello, world
entry.content:
First post. This is where the writing goes — build notes, postmortems, things I learned the hard way, whatever’s worth writing down.

Delete this once you’ve got real content, or keep it around as the origin commit. Your call.
entry.summary: First post. This is where the writing goes — build notes, postmortems, things I learned the hard way, whatever’s worth writing down.
